final_answer:
Subject: Room Availability Inquiry for Next Weekend

Dear Hotel Reservation Team,

I am writing to inquire about room availability for next weekend. Could you please confirm if you have any vacancies available between [Insert Start Date] and [Insert End Date]? We are interested in learning about the rates and any special packages offered during that time.

Looking forward to your response.
Thanks for your help.<|im_end|>
